---
name: Platform / program submission
about: Add a new monetization platform, affiliate program, or case study
title: "[add] <platform or program name>"
labels: ["addition", "needs-verification"]
assignees: []
---

## What are you adding?

- [ ] Monetization platform (donation / sponsorship / ads / fiscal host)
- [ ] Affiliate / referral program
- [ ] Case study (publicly disclosed sponsorship numbers)
- [ ] Correction to an existing entry

## Official source (required)

I verified the facts at this URL (paste the exact page you fetched):

<!-- e.g. https://www.ethicalads.io/publishers/ -->

## Key facts

- **Name:**
- **Category:**
- **Status:** alive / alive_pivoted / acquired / dead
- **Monetization model / fees:**
- **Payout support:**
- **Best for:**

## If adding an affiliate program

- **Official program URL:**
- **Commission structure:** one-time / recurring / % / flat
- **Cookie / attribution duration:**
- **Payout method & minimum:**
- [ ] I confirmed this program exists (not invented)

## If adding a case study

- **Source URL with disclosed numbers:**
- [ ] Numbers are publicly disclosed (not a leak / not "a friend said")
- [ ] I distinguished sponsorship revenue from commercial revenue

## Pricing (if any)

- [ ] I labeled all prices / fees as **estimate / reference only**

## Notes

<!-- Anything else maintainers should know. -->
